stories.title: Morning news brief
stories.description: President Trump says U.S. will blockade the Strait of Hormuz, failed U.S.-Iran negotiations cause oil prices to surge, Hungary's Viktor Orbán loses reelection bid.

stories.title: Trump lambasts Pope Leo XIV, extending feud over Iran war with American pontiff
stories.description: President Donald Trump delivered an extraordinary broadside against Pope Leo XIV on Sunday night, saying he didn't think the U.S.-born global leader of the Catholic Church is "doing a very good job."

stories.title: After failed peace talks, President Trump threatens to blockade the Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Less than a day after peace talks between the US and Iran failed, President Trump said that he will blockade the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Amid the Iran war, Ukraine makes gains against the Kremlin
stories.description: With attention focused on Iran, Ukraine has made economic, battlefield and diplomatic gains against the Kremlin.

stories.title: Iran-US conflict fought amid censorships and digital fog of war
stories.description: Amid the war in Iran, countries have been censoring and policing what their citizens are saying about the conflict and what information they have access to.

stories.title: After Iran talks falter, the big question is what happens next?
stories.description: Twenty-one hours was not enough to end 47 years of hostility between Iran and the US, writes the BBC's Lyse Doucet.

stories.title: We spoke to the man making viral Lego-style AI videos for Iran. Experts say it's powerful propaganda
stories.description: "Slopaganda" is too weak a term to capture how powerful this "highly sophisticated" content is, one expert says.

stories.title: Concerns after satellite provider restricts Iran images following US pressure
stories.description: Planet Labs says it is restricting coverage of Iran and parts of the Middle East indefinitely.

stories.title: Lebanon and Israel officials to meet in US on Tuesday
stories.description: A senior Lebanese official earlier told the BBC that Lebanon would only take part in talks if a ceasefire was in place.

stories.title: Historic Vance-Ghalibaf talks must bridge deep distrust
stories.description: Face-to-face talks would mark the highest-level engagement between Iran and the US since the 1979 Islamic Revolution.

stories.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
stories.description: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

stories.title: 'Endless fears': Even if fighting stops, the damage to Iran's children will endure
stories.description: The BBC has been able to obtain testimony from parents and those trying to help children deal with the distress that comes with war.

stories.title: Lebanon thought there was a ceasefire - then Israel unleashed deadly blitz
stories.description: Israel says Lebanon is not included in the ceasefire the US agreed to halt the war with Iran.

stories.title: BBC at the site of Israeli air strikes in Beirut
stories.description: At least 182 people were killed and 890 others wounded, according to the Lebanese health ministry.

stories.title: Has US achieved its war objectives in Iran?
stories.description: Key US objectives at the start of the war were to stop Iran getting a nuclear weapon and degrading its arsenal.

stories.title: Pope Leo XIV begins landmark Algeria visit on first leg of Africa tour
stories.description: Pope Leo XIV arrived in Algeria on Monday at the start of an 11-day tour of Africa, the first international trip of his papacy that risked being overshadowed by public criticism from US President Donald Trump over his stance on the Iran war.

stories.title: Iran war prompts European rethink on energy security: How can the EU become more independent?
stories.description: Europe’s energy dependence has been sharply exposed by the war in Iran. Although efforts have been made over the past four years to reduce reliance on Russia, disruptions to liquefied natural gas (LNG) shipments through the Strait of Hormuz have highlighted the EU’s continued vul...

stories.title: Trump calls Pope Leo 'terrible' in public attack after pontiff's anti-war message
stories.description: US President Donald Trump delivered an extraordinary broadside against Pope Leo XIV on Sunday, accusing the US-born pontiff of being "a very liberal person" and "terrible for foreign policy". His comments came after Leo suggested over the weekend that a "delusion of omnipotence" ...

stories.title: Iran executed 'at least 1,639 people' in 2025, highest number since 1989
stories.description: Iran executed at least 1,639 people last year, an average of more than four executions per day, Norway-based Iran Human Rights and Paris-based Together Against the Death Penalty said in their joint annual report, warning that the regime risked killing even more people this year a...

stories.title: Middle East war live: Iran says US naval blockade of Hormuz 'illegal' and 'piracy'
stories.description: Iran's military said a US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz set to begin on Monday would be illegal and amount to piracy, warning that no Gulf ports would be safe if its own are threatened. US President Donald Trump earlier told reporters he didn't "care" whether Tehran retu...

stories.title: Trump orders naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz after failed US-Iran talks
stories.description: President Donald Trump said the US Navy will begin a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz Monday morning after US-Iran ceasefire talks in Pakistan collapsed without agreement. This announcement fuelled fears of further disruption to global energy supplies and shipping routes.

stories.title: Lebanese govt politically present, operationally absent': PM accuses Israel of violating int'l law'
stories.description: François Picard is pleased to welcome Jad Shahrour, journalist and Spokesperson at the Samir Kassir Foundation. Amid Israeli military operations across Lebanon, international negotiations and a ceasefire with Iran does not extend to Lebanon. The Lebanese territory remains an acti...

stories.title: US threatens to block Strait of Hormuz: Trump ‘playing his last card’, former NATO general says
stories.description: Gavin Lee is joined by General Jean-Paul Palomeros, former Supreme Allied Commander for NATO's Transformation and French Air Force veteran, to discuss the latest developments in the Middle East. In light of President Trump's recent threats to impose a military blockade on the Str...

stories.title: What Iran is saying about US plan to blockade ports
stories.description: Iran’s military has called US blockade plans in the Strait of Hormuz an “act of piracy”.

stories.title: Refugee in my own city: Surviving Tehran’s bombing, with my cat for company
stories.description: Despite the relentless bombing, Sana refuses to flee Tehran, clinging to resilience and fleeting moments of normalcy.

stories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 45 of the US-Iran conflict?
stories.description: The move to blockade the Strait of Hormuz is the latest escalation in the war after failure to sign peace deal.

stories.title: Who is Yechiel Leiter, Israel’s US envoy leading talks with Lebanon?
stories.description: Israel's envoy to the US has far-right ties and has engaged in contentious rhetoric during Lebanese peace negotiations.

stories.title: ‘Terrible for foreign policy’: Trump attacks Pope Leo after peace appeal
stories.description: Leo, ​who last year became the first US-born pope, has emerged as an outspoken critic of the US-Israeli ⁠war on Iran.

stories.title: Oil prices surge past $103 a barrel after US announces blockade of Iran
stories.description: Asian stocks fall as naval blockade threat injects new turmoil into financial markets.

stories.title: US military threatens to blockade all Iranian ports starting on Monday
stories.description: Vessels will still be able to transit the Strait of Hormuz to and from non-Iranian ports, says US Central Command.

stories.title: Iran war live: US military says it will block Iranian traffic in Hormuz
stories.description: CENTCOM says the blockade will begin at 14:00 GMT, as Iran warns of even higher prices at the pump.

stories.title: US military to begin blockade of Iranian ports on Monday
stories.description: The US military said it would begin a blockade of all Iranian ports on Monday, after talks between the warring sides in Pakistan failed to produce an agreement, with President Donald Trump blaming the Islamic republic’s refusal to abandon its nuclear ambitions. Trump had announce...

stories.title: Iran ‘will not bow to any threats’, Ghalibaf declares
stories.description: • Iran parliament speaker says US must decide ‘whether it can earn our trust or not’• Tehran warns of strong response to any confrontation; calls control over strait ‘non-negotiable’• Iran demands full sanction lifting; US offers phased approach• Conflicting claims over $6bn froz...

stories.title: Pope sees ‘moral obligation’ to protect Lebanese
stories.description: Pope Leo XIV VATICAN CITY: Pope Leo XIV expressed his closeness to the people of Lebanon on Sunday, saying there was a “moral obligation” to protect them while calling on warring parties to seek peace. Lebanese authorities say more than 2,000 people have been killed in Israeli st...

stories.title: After Trump’s blockade announcement, IRGC says will view military vessels approaching Hormuz as ceasefire breach
stories.description: Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) said on Sunday that any military vessels attempting to approach the Strait of Hormuz would be considered a violation of the two-week ceasefire with the US, and warned that it would be dealt with harshly and decisively. “The strait ...

stories.title: Dar urges US, Iran to uphold commitment to ceasefire as talks conclude without deal
stories.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar urged the United States and Iran to remain committed to a ceasefire after both countries ended historic face-to-face talks without an agreement on Sunday. “It is imperative that the parties continue to uphold their commitment t...

stories.title: UN agency chiefs seek end to war rules violations in Middle East
stories.description: GENEVA: UN agency chiefs on Saturday demanded an end to impunity for widespread international law violations in the Middle East, as casualties pile up six weeks into the war unleashed by US-Israeli strikes on Iran. In a joint statement, the heads of multiple United Nations agenci...

stories.title: Iranian crude returns to India after seven years as tankers dock at key ports
stories.description: The one-month exemption permitted the sale of Iranian oil already in transit, aimed at easing global supply disruptions and containing prices

stories.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE updates: Iran military say U.S. naval blockade 'amounts to piracy'
stories.description: The U.S. military has said it will begin a blockade of all maritime traffic entering ‌and exiting Iranian ports and coastal areas on Monday

stories.title: Luxury brands face profits squeeze as Iran conflict shrinks Dubai Mall sales
stories.description: Luxury brands in March reported sales drops of 30-50% at ​the Mall of the Emirates

stories.title: MoS Margherita attends mourning ceremony for late Iranian leader Ayatollah Khamenei
stories.description: The ceremony was organised by the Iranian embassy on Sunday (April 12, 2026) to pay respect to the departed leader on the 40th day (Chehelum) of his demise

stories.title: Slovakia's Fico ready to cooperate with Hungary's new Prime Minister
stories.description: Under Fico Slovakia has been ‌a close ally of Hungary, with both ​neighbours maintaining warm ties with Moscow, opposing European Union sanctions and keeping up purchases of ⁠Russian oil and gas

stories.title: Israel-Iran war updates: U.S. Central Command says it will begin blockade of Iranian ports Monday
stories.description: The U.S. president said his threat to impose 50% tariffs on goods from countries that sold weapons to Iran was aimed at China

stories.title: US vessels must leave Persian Gulf, representative of Iran’s supreme leader says
stories.description: According to Abdul Majid Hakeem Ilahi, amid the US and Israeli aggression against Iran, the situation near the Strait of Hormuz remains tense

stories.title: Saudi Arabia’s oil exports to China to fall by almost half in May — Bloomberg
stories.description: According to the report, the decline is due to a sharp rise in prices following Saudi Aramco’s decision to raise export prices to record levels amid the conflict surrounding Iran and the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz

stories.title: IN BRIEF: Market reaction to US-announced blockade of Iran
stories.description: Futures for Brent crude oil with June delivery on the London ICE exchange rose by more than 9%

stories.title: Washington in deadlock after failure of Pakistan-hosted talks with Iran — CNN
stories.description: Now that the United States has failed to get Iran to accept all its demands, "unattractive options" are what remain for Washington, the TV channel noted
